description: India's largest online pharmacy and healthcare platform offering medicine delivery, diagnostics, doctor consultations, and health products. 50+ million customers.
business_model: B2C - Direct to consumers; B2B for hospital/clinic supplies
target_market: Indian consumers seeking convenient healthcare access
competitive_advantage: Largest online pharmacy in India, integrated health ecosystem, strong logistics network

varden_fit.rationale: Asian market reference for pharmacy integration model - lessons for potential European expansion
